dimensions.name: coverage
dimensions.evidence: `.furrow/rows/post-install-hygiene/definition.yaml` declares 8 deliverables, and `.furrow/rows/post-install-hygiene/plan.json` places each of those 8 exactly once across waves 1-3 with no omissions or duplicates.

dimensions.name: feasibility
dimensions.evidence: All dependency edges are respected (`test-isolation-guard` in wave 1; all deliverables that depend on it in waves 2-3; `cross-model-per-deliverable-diff` in wave 3 after `xdg-config-consumer-wiring`), and the file_ownership globs in each wave are disjoint in `plan.json`.

dimensions.name: specificity
dimensions.evidence: Every assignment in `.furrow/rows/post-install-hygiene/plan.json` names a concrete specialist (`test-engineer` or `harness-engineer`) and includes at least one explicit `file_ownership` glob.

dimensions.name: research-grounding
dimensions.evidence: The plan artifacts cite research files globally (`.furrow/rows/post-install-hygiene/research/*.md`) and the prompt lists findings, but neither `plan.json` nor the architecture decisions attach major choices to specific research sections such as `cross-model-and-xdg.md` Section B/C or `install-artifacts.md` Section A/C, which the rubric requires.
